title: asphodelus serotinus
intro: Asphodelus serotinus, also known as autumn asphodel or late asphodel, is a perennial plant species in the asphodel family, characterized by its white or pale yellow flowers and grass-like foliage. The medicinal properties of Asphodelus serotinus lie in its ability to lower inflammation and reduce fever, as well as its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this plant include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting the digestive system. The herbal preparations of Asphodelus serotinus typically involve infusing the roots or flowers in water or alcohol to create teas, tinctures, and other medicinal remedies.
